data_grade.label: Grade
data_grade.tooltip: Server-side A/B/C/D from data_grade(): collapses sleeve quote age, underlying quote age, holdings age, IV source, and expiry skew. A = full size, B = half size, C = monitor only, D = blocked.

signal.label: Signal
signal.tooltip: Price-space edge classification on the kernel-aware model edge. STRONG SELL >= +30pp, sell >= +10pp, lean sell >= 0, lean fade >= -10, fade < -10. Grade C/D rows with positive edge show AVOID DATA.

yb_etf.label: YB
yb_etf.tooltip: YieldBOOST ETF ticker. Click to open the per-ETF Vol/VRP tab.

model_name.label: Model
model_name.tooltip: Pricing kernel for this row: Bates (jumps) > Heston (stochastic vol) > AZ rescale. No Black-Scholes.

edge_pp_of_max_loss.label: Edge ($)
edge_pp_of_max_loss.tooltip: (spread mid - model fair) / max loss x 100. Price-space, kernel-aware. Positive = market pays more than the model fair = SELL.

az_cone_residual_iv.label: AZ cone
az_cone_residual_iv.tooltip: Sleeve IV minus AZ-implied sleeve IV at the mapped underlying strike. Positive = sleeve trades rich vs the underlying surface.

model_fair.label: Fair
model_fair.tooltip: Model fair value of the short spread in sleeve currency. Hover row cells for AZ/Heston/Bates side-by-side when available.

spread_mid_market.label: Mid
spread_mid_market.tooltip: Current spread mid-market price (short put mid minus long put mid). Per sleeve share; same sign as credit to sell the spread.

iv_full_proxy.label: IV
iv_full_proxy.tooltip: Average IV of the long and short legs at the held expiry (chain input, not a fair value).

dollar_gamma_per_1pct_underlying.label: $-gamma /1%U
dollar_gamma_per_1pct_underlying.tooltip: Dollar P&L per 1% adverse move in the underlying (short spread = negative).

theta_per_day.label: theta/day
theta_per_day.tooltip: Theta per calendar day on the short spread. Positive = collecting carry.

expected_weekly_carry_usd.label: Carry/wk
expected_weekly_carry_usd.tooltip: model_fair x 100 = expected dollar carry per OCC contract per week.

days_to_earnings.label: Event
days_to_earnings.tooltip: Days to next known earnings. Red badge = inside held window; use Bates fair for jump risk.

sleeve_2x.label: 2x sleeve
sleeve_2x.tooltip: Listed 2x levered ETF sleeve symbol held by the YieldBOOST fund.

strike_long.label: Long put strike
strike_long.tooltip: Lower strike of Granite's bull put spread (long leg).

strike_short.label: Short put strike
strike_short.tooltip: Higher strike of Granite's bull put spread (short leg).

az_put_spread_fair.label: AZ fair
az_put_spread_fair.tooltip: Avellaneda-Zhang rescale fair: map held strikes to underlying-equivalent strikes, look up underlying IV, price in sleeve space.

heston_put_spread_fair.label: Heston fair
heston_put_spread_fair.tooltip: Heston stochastic-vol fair with AHJ propagation to the 2x sleeve.

bates_put_spread_fair.label: Bates fair
bates_put_spread_fair.tooltip: Bates jump-diffusion fair with AHJ truncation for single-stock earnings risk.

model_disagreement_pp_of_max_loss.label: Disagreement
model_disagreement_pp_of_max_loss.tooltip: Max minus min model fair across calibrated kernels, in percent of max-loss. >20pp = model uncertainty; size at half band or skip.

carry_vs_tail.label: Carry vs 5% tail
carry_vs_tail.tooltip: Ratio of theta carry over the held horizon to a 5% gap-down tail loss estimate. <0.5x = underpaid for tail risk.

sleeve_diffusion_drag_annual.label: Ito drag (x=2, /yr)
sleeve_diffusion_drag_annual.tooltip: sigma_underlying squared: simple Ito variance drag for a 2x daily-rebalanced sleeve.

vrp_vol_2x_base.label: VRP sigma (event-stripped)
vrp_vol_2x_base.tooltip: Sleeve IV minus event-stripped sleeve RV in sigma space.

days_to_event.label: Days to next earnings
days_to_event.tooltip: Calendar days until the next earnings event for this underlying.

event_implied_move_pct_underlying.label: Implied move (underlying)
event_implied_move_pct_underlying.tooltip: Implied 1-sigma event-day move on the underlying from the IV variance split.

event_historical_move_pct_underlying.label: Historical MAD
event_historical_move_pct_underlying.tooltip: Median absolute return on prior earnings days for this underlying.

event_move_richness_pct.label: Richness
event_move_richness_pct.tooltip: (implied / historical) - 1. >= +30% = market overpays the event (SELL move premium).
